title: the Wave Dweller
description:
(This is a parody of the Dweller trend) get stalked by the Wave Dweller, a long blue thing who wants to kill you
explore 2 NEW dimensions
and fight 2 forms of the wave dweller
all in one mod.
body:
**WELCOME TO THE MOD: In this mod you find one major Mob**

The Wave Dweller, a Parody on the Cave Dweller trend

it will spawn both at night and in its biome

the mod Has meny features such as:
- 2 new Dimensions: the Wave world and The Void.
- new structures and lots more

but i don't wanna give away to much ;)
